classic.notes: Modern UI for touchscreen Pebbles: tap/swipe/flick controls, full-screen album art, and 3 live layouts (Retro+, Modern Classic, Modern Time). Double-press Up/Down to seek, volume ring, deep settings. This build: settings now persist across restarts, reliable double-press seek with contained overlays, crisper seek haptic, bottom-text elapsed/duration, battery % alignment. Test build - your feedback shapes what ships.

browser.notes: The Media Browser is now fully touch-enabled on Pebble Time 2 and Round 2 - every menu is tap and scroll navigable.
